overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a gothic cathedral interior. The character traverses from brightly lit corridors with stained glass windows through dark passages and back to the main hall, interacting briefly with a guard before continuing exploration.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral corridor with stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cathedral corridor with swords on back

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone columns supporting the cathedral ceiling
colorful gothic stained glass windows with religious imagery
wooden ladder leaning against the wall
stone statue of a robed figure in a niche
red and white checkered marble tile flooring

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a well-lit gothic cathedral corridor characterized by tall stone pillars and colorful stained glass windows on the left wall. The checkered marble floor reflects the mixed lighting from wall sconces and window light. A wooden ladder and stone statues line the right side of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral side chamber entrance with guard

events.description: approaches guard standing by wooden door
enters dark corridor, lighting drops significantly to near darkness

agents.ego_description: approaching the guarded door and entering the dark passage beyond

notable_agents.action: guard in ornate plate armor standing by the door holding a halberd

entered.detail: large dark wooden door with metal studs and handles
stone archway framing the wooden door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large wooden door guarded by an armored NPC holding a polearm. After passing the guard, Geralt enters a dark corridor where the lighting shifts dramatically to near darkness, with only wall sconces providing minimal illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark cathedral corridor lit by wall sconces

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit corridor with minimal visibility

entered.detail: wall-mounted torch sconces providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: Geralt traverses a narrow, dark corridor illuminated only by sporadic wall sconces casting flickering orange light. The stone walls and pillars create a claustrophobic atmosphere as the character moves steadily forward through the checkered floor passage.

events.description: exits dark corridor into area with natural light from large windows

agents.ego_description: emerging from the dark passage into a lit corridor with views of outdoor greenery

entered.detail: view of trees and sky visible through large arched windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the darkness, the corridor opens to reveal large windows showing outdoor trees and a dusky sky. The lighting transitions from artificial torchlight to natural twilight mixed with interior illumination as Geralt continues along the checkered floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: main cathedral hall with benches and seated NPCs

events.description: enters the main cathedral hall from the side corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the main hall passing NPCs seated on benches

notable_agents.action: person in medieval clothing sitting on wooden bench
person sitting near the stained glass windows

entered.detail: tall ornate stained glass windows with blue and green religious scenes
simple wooden benches lined along the walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious cathedral main hall with towering stained glass windows casting colored light onto the checkered floor. Wooden benches line the walls where NPCs sit quietly. The architecture features massive stone pillars and ornate statues as Geralt walks through this grand space.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral chamber with tall stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand chamber admiring the tall architecture

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through the grand cathedral chamber, approaching the tall stained glass windows that dominate the left wall. The space feels more open as the wooden benches fall behind, revealing more of the checkered floor pattern and stone architectural details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic cathedral that transitions from bright corridors into oppressive darkness before opening into a grand, light-filled hall. It begins in a well-lit passage where colorful stained glass and wall sconces reflect off a checkered marble floor, moving past stone statues and a wooden ladder. As the camera approaches a guarded wooden door, the environment shifts dramatically into a narrow, claustrophobic corridor illuminated only by the flickering orange light of sporadic wall sconces. The scene then expands as the darkness gives way to natural twilight filtering through large windows, leading the camera out of the tunnel and into a spacious main hall. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal towering stained glass windows and massive stone pillars, gliding past quiet NPCs on wooden benches across the expansive checkered floor.
